summary: A brief professional biography of Jeff Dean, outlining his role as Google's Chief Scientist, his history co-founding the Google Brain project, and his broad research interests spanning machine learning, distributed systems, and societally beneficial AI applications.

principles.statement: Focus AI applications on solving problems that help billions of people in societally beneficial ways.
principles.rationale: To maximize the positive, large-scale impact of machine learning and AI research on society.
principles.source_quote: ...applications of AI to problems that help billions of people in societally beneficial ways.

signature_quotes.text: My areas of focus include machine learning and AI and applications of AI to problems that help billions of people in societally beneficial ways.
signature_quotes.context: Describing his primary research goals as Google's Chief Scientist.

signature_quotes.text: In 2011, I co-founded the Google Brain project/team, focused on making progress towards intelligent machines.
signature_quotes.context: Reflecting on the origins of his dedicated AI research work at Google.
